history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A portrait-style image shows a young man facing slightly to the side in front of shelves filled with books, with large bold text overlaid at the bottom.

Main Subject:
A young man with short brown hair and light skin is shown from the chest up, facing slightly left of the camera. He wears a dark jacket over a dark shirt and holds one hand near the lower right area of the frame, with fingers partially visible.

Setting:
The background appears to be an indoor room with wall-mounted shelving packed with many hardcover books in assorted colors. Warm, dim lighting casts soft shadows on the subject and the shelves.

Visual Details:
The man’s face is softly lit, with his eyes directed off-camera to the left. The books behind him are arranged in tight rows, with spines showing a range of reds, browns, and dark tones. The camera angle is straight-on and close, emphasizing the man’s head and upper torso. Large white text with a black outline is placed along the bottom of the image.

Visible Text:
YANG GUA RASAKAN

Practical Summary:
The image shows a close-up of a man standing indoors in front of a wall of books. Bold overlaid text reads “YANG GUA RASAKAN.”
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

YANG GUA RASAKAN

# Structured Version

- **YANG GUA RASAKAN**

# Notes

- No unclear text detected.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
